stemHtml: What is the definiton of the term Acceptable Means of Compliance (AMCs)?

options.a: They are non-binding standards approved by EASA to present means to achieve compliance with the basic regulation and its implementing rules.
options.b: They are binding administrative acts adopted by the european commission which must be strictly followed by all member states.
options.c: They are non-binding material issued solely to assist in the understanding of the basic regulation, without suggesting specific methods of compliance.
options.d: They are technical specifications that must be applied mandatorily during the certification process of an aircraft.
